packageRules.description: Microsoft.AspNetCore.TestHost is referenced twice in AI.Sentinel.Tests.csproj, once per TargetFramework Condition. Renovate cannot see the Condition, so it rewrites both lines to the same version and pushes the net10.0-only package onto net8.0 (NU1202). Keep the net8.0 line inside 8.x; the net10.0 line updates normally.
